author: System Migration
context: Investigating if Serum 2 exposes parameters via generator path and if presets can be navigated.
observation: Parameters are fully exposed (541 real names and readable values). Internal preset library is walled off.
result: Parameter reading is viable. Preset recall is NOT possible via FL API.
tested_values: Serum 2 parameter sweep and preset navigation.
known_pitfalls: Exposing all 541 parameters blindly is too noisy. Preset recall by name is a dead end.
next_recommended_action: Build/tweak patches from a curated parameter subset instead of relying on preset recall.
